name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Arbitrary Command Execution Using WSL
notes:
This Building Block detects Possible usage of Windows Subsystem for Linux (WSL) binary as a LOLBIN to execute arbitrary linux and windows commands.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: oscd.community, Zach Stanford @svch0st, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: Arbitrary Command Execution Using WSL
SIGMA Description: Detects potential abuse of Windows Subsystem for Linux (WSL) binary as a LOLBIN to execute arbitrary linux and windows commands


Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Arbitrary Command Execution Using WSL on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of wsl.exe

when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '% -e %' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '% --exec%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '% --system%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '% --shell-type %' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '% /mnt/c%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '% --user root%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '% -u root%') AQL filter query
when the event matches Parent Process Name (custom) is any of cmd.exe
when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '% -d %' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '% -e kill %') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Arbitrary Command Execution Using WSL on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of wsl.exe

AND when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '% -e %' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '% --exec%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '% --system%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '% --shell-type %' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '% /mnt/c%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '% --user root%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '% -u root%') AQL filter query
AND NOT when the event matches Parent Process Name (custom) is any of cmd.exe
AND NOT when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '% -d %' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '% -e kill %') AQL filter query
